notes: Refined problem-statement v1.1: (1) Incorporated three-bottleneck framing per strategic review condition #1; (2) Honest positioning of MAGIC as potential invalidator of FM1 thesis; (3) Downgraded bilinear unification from theoretical depth to taxonomic convenience; (4) Clarified probe NOT executed and all LDS claims are unverified predictions; (5) Rank-ordered uncertainties with probe as highest; (6) All 4 strategic review conditions explicitly addressed. Key change from v1.0: shifted from 'Hessian doesn't matter' to 'three complementary bottlenecks' and foregrounded MAGIC invalidation risk.
